ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device model */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "input_signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the input signal type */,
  "output_signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the output signal type */,
  "power_supply_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the power supply type */,
  "code_no" TEXT /* Unique code number for the device */,
  "operational_range_min" REAL /* Minimum operational range of the device */,
  "operational_range_max" REAL /* Maximum operational range of the device */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the device */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "actuator_type" TEXT /* Type of actuator (e.g., valve, motor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_input_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_power_supply_id FOREIGN KEY ("power_supply_id") REFERENCES power_supplies ("power_supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_output_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type (e.g., Voltage, Current) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the signal type (e.g., V, A) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_supplies" (
  "power_supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power supply type */,
  "power_supply_type" TEXT /* Type of power supply (e.g., AC 100 V, AC 200 V) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Specifications or details about the power supply */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the power supply */,
  "current" REAL /* Current of the power supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_supply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category of devices */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Sensors, Actuators) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device model in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of devices available in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the inventory record */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the devices in the inventory (e.g., new, used, refurbished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_inventory_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device model that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance work done */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair, replacement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., maintenance, engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Device ID of the accessed device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device model for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics recorded for the device */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the device */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for future maintenance or actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_reports_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_signal_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device model */,
  "input_signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the input signal type */,
  "output_signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the output signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_signal_mappings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_signal_mappings_output_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_signal_mappings_input_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_power_supply_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device model */,
  "power_supply_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the power supply type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_power_supply_mappings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_power_supply_mappings_power_supply_id FOREIGN KEY ("power_supply_id") REFERENCES power_supplies ("power_supply_id")
)
